signatureMove.name: Thwack!
signatureMove.endStepEffect: The opponent suffers -1 Melee Stat until end of turn.

abilities.name: Slightly Maddening
abilities.description: You may make one opponent re-roll their die when determining who activates first.

abilities.name: Look at the Shiny Thing
abilities.description: If this character is in possession of one or more Moonstones during the Replenish Step, you may have another friendly character within 4" and LoS gain +1 energy.

abilities.name: Plant the Placard
abilities.description: Move all other friendly characters within the pulse up to 1". This character cannot take Jog or Step actions or make a Reaction Step until end of turn.

arcaneOutcomes.text: All friendly characters within the pulse restore X Wds. All characters within the pulse suffer 1 Wd.
Choose a model within 3" and LoS of this character. Then choose another model within 3×X" and LoS of the second model. Place the first model within 3×X" of the second model.
This character's controller must choose either to have him suffer 4 Wds or be Removed from Play.
